item.name: Kingly Peacock Horn
item.description: A horn that, when blown, summons a peacock to bear you in majesty.

mount.name: Kingly Peacock
mount.action: Summon forth your kingly peacock, an avian embodiment of nobility hailing from Othard.
mount.description: From the Near East to the Far, the peacock has long been esteemed not only for its beauty, but also its penchant for eating harmful vilekin. This particular creature belongs to a breed created by improving a species indigenous to Othard with geomancy.
mount.tooltip:
Don't you be taken in
by his peacockin'.
- Rowena
